Real weddings

The Fun Stuff

The moments. The memories. The magic.

This is where you'll find a collection of the weddings, celebrations, creative projects, and unforgettable moments I've had the privilege of being part of.

I love weddings that feel personal — the thoughtful details, the packed dance floors, the emotional speeches, the spontaneous moments that nobody planned but everyone remembers. Every wedding tells a different story, and that's what makes this job so special.

Take a look around, get inspired, and imagine what's possible for your own celebration.

After all, the best weddings aren't about perfection. They're about creating memories you'll be talking about for years to come.

Loading Events.

Curating weddings that feel like the best party of your life.
